case_title: LYLE BAUTISTA VS. ADRIAN JAY PALAROAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAUTISTA, LYLE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BAUTISTA, LYLE AS TO DEFENDANT PALAROAN, ADRIAN JAY ALDEGUER, FREDERICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES NONE LISTED. SERVED NOV-10-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALAROAN, ADRIAN JAY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-02-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT FREDERICK ALDEGUER WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAY HEARING AND HE HAS NOT BEEN SERVED. PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL AGAINST FREDERICK ALDEGUER AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-02-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
